div.h2: Fast, secure access with Bhutan NDI
div.p: Log in using your Bhutan NDI Wallet without entering a password. Simply scan the QR code, approve the request in your wallet, and continue securely.

div.div: No need to remember usernames and passwords for this flow.
Approve the request in your wallet and continue in seconds.
Identity verification happens through Bhutan NDI Wallet.

div.p: Use your wallet to scan the QR code and securely verify your identity.

div.small: Scan QR with Bhutan NDI Wallet

ol.li: Scan the QR and share your identity
